summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Casini accounting firm website - both backend and frontend functionality verified successfully

Tax comparator API (POST /api/calculator/tax-comparison) with Micro vs SRL vs PFA calculations
Contact form API (POST /api/contact) with proper validation and success response
Navigation links functionality (Servicii, Certificări, Calculatoare, Despre Noi, Contact)
Hero section with '20+ years experience' badge and CECCAR certification
Salary calculator frontend integration - input, calculation, result display
Tax comparator frontend integration - showing all three tax options with calculations
Contact form submission with success toast message in Romanian
Footer contact information display (Str. Cozia 1b, +40 722 123 456, casini2003@yahoo.com, L-V 8-18)
Romanian language localization throughout the site
Professional design and layout for accounting firm branding
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (13/13 major features working)
